app.title: Show HN: Filling PDF forms with AI using client-side tool calling
app.author: nip
app.description: Fill PDF forms with AI using client-side tool calling
proposed_tests: Visit the tool URL and test filling a sample PDF form
Compare performance of the tool vs manual form filling
Test the tool's ability to fill complex form layouts
